Window of Risk updated - Intraday post (30/oct)

Window of Risk (update):

Window of Risk Pt. 2 - Flows update

Weekly post:

FOMC week, Greeks breakdown - Weekly post (27-31/Oct)

I updated the ‘Window of Risk’ post, yesterday, Please, re-read it.The market is complacent, only counts on good news, and heavily leveraged for them. However the positioning is thin, volume is low, and bad news are not priced in, while there is a lot of geo risk that the market is complacent on.This generates a synthetic dealer short vomma profile under the hood, and synthetic fat left-tail.

Let’s look at today’s positioning…

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

We have a short fly pattern again, centering around net 6884.98;the speed profile is net negative slightly skewed, with centroid of 6892.14 - 6900.64 area. This is a weak sticky level after 2PM.

Upside pivot is at 6905.44with target of 6934.98, also a local vanna flip there, acting as a daily max, providing us a nice reversion opportunity. Sold RV and sold fix strike skew is needed to break this line. Low probability, but if it happens, 6980 pin with margin of error of 7k.

Downside pivot is 6870.40with downside target of 6822.47 that is a very supportive zone.Less likely to be hit, but only a slight diff between up vs down bets, see below.

Don’t forget that the market is headline sensitive. Even if it seems that US/CN deal is on, it isn’t. It is only temporal shitshow, and market is not prepared for left-tail. They are like ‘good news are good news’, and thats it. No bad news. However, bad news are very bad news. If any of it comes, 6750 is the first downside target intraday, and 6680 is the ultimate (it would revert back up to 6750).

Market bets on more upside vs downside, with 11.80% more probability.Slight difference. But the main bet is still ranging with additional upsticks.Second is a downward move then reversion,and third is the upside pin.Left-tail is lower than the number of hairs on Putin’s forehead.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
